title: AI Agent Ready
description: The AI agent audit workspace is being prepared.
cardDescription: This page will help assess whether your site is ready for AI agents, prioritize improvements, and track accessibility and discoverability recommendations.
heroDescription: Quick audit of the public site to verify what an agent can find and use.
heroChecksDescription: The checks are read-only and focus on what matters for agents.
heroNoUrl: No project URL available to launch the audit.
loadingDescription: Checking headers, `robots.txt`, sitemap, and Markdown negotiation.
nothingPriorityDescription: The checks did not reveal any blocking issue or major warning.
priorityActionsDescription: Only the points that need a fix or a review.
summaryWithIssues: The points below should be addressed first to avoid agents missing or misusing the site.
summaryNoIssues: No blocking issue detected in the executed checks.
loadScanProjectError: Unable to load the scan project.
check_robots_txt_description: Checks file presence, crawler groups, and allow/disallow directives.
check_sitemap_description: Looks for a declaration in robots.txt or a fallback at /sitemap.xml.
check_link_headers_description: Finds machine-detectable documentation, APIs, feeds, or well-known resources.
check_markdown_negotiation_description: Checks support for `Accept: text/markdown` on the homepage.
check_ai_bot_rules_description: Checks for known AI crawler groups in robots.txt.
check_content_signals_description: Checks for a `Content-Signal` header or equivalent content policy link.
check_web_bot_auth_description: Optional validation of signed access for bots.
